## Summary

<!-- What does this PR do? One sentence. -->

## Related RFC

Fixes / implements / relates to RFC-XXXX

## Type of Change

- [ ] New RFC (draft)
- [ ] RFC status update (Draft → Active → Accepted/Rejected)
- [ ] Documentation / research
- [ ] Example / sketch
- [ ] Repository infrastructure

## Checklist

- [ ] RFC follows the template in `rfcs/0000-template.md`
- [ ] RFC number does not conflict with an existing RFC
- [ ] If this RFC changes the vision, RFC-0001 has been updated or a separate PR does so
- [ ] All open questions in the RFC are listed in the **Open Questions** section
- [ ] Alternatives considered section is filled out
